title: Waymo Just Crossed 1 Million Driverless Rides — No Human Inside
script: There are robotaxis on US streets right now with no steering wheel, no pedals, and no human inside. Waymo's fully autonomous fleet crossed 1 million paid rides in May 2024 — all without a human driver. The Jaguar I-PACE robotaxi picks you up, navigates construction, pedestrians, and rain, and drops you off. No tips. No small talk. The era of human-driven taxis just quietly started ending.
